title: Prince Harry lost his Daily Mail case: Now a £50 million legal bill may be the bigger story
summary_full: Prince Harry and other prominent figures lost their case against the Daily Mail publisher. They had accused the company of unlawful information-gathering methods over many years. The judge dismissed all claims, stating insufficient proof of wrongdoing was presented. The claimants now face a substantial legal bill of around fifty million pounds. Associated Newspapers Ltd welcomed the ruling, calling the claims preposterous and misguided.
